<a id="class-visualshadernodevectorcompose"></a>

# VisualShaderNodeVectorCompose

**Inherits:** [VisualShaderNodeVectorBase](class_visualshadernodevectorbase.md#class-visualshadernodevectorbase) **<** [VisualShaderNode](class_visualshadernode.md#class-visualshadernode) **<** [Resource](class_resource.md#class-resource) **<** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

Composes a [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2), [Vector3](class_vector3.md#class-vector3) or 4D vector (represented as a [Quaternion](class_quaternion.md#class-quaternion)) from scalars within the visual shader graph.

## Description

Creates a `vec2`, `vec3` or `vec4` using scalar values that can be provided from separate inputs.
